positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.pl
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_teeth(sK1)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    has_teeth(sK0)).

cnf(u19,negated_conjecture,
    platypus(sK1)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~platypus(X0) | ~has_teeth(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define mammal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define human(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define reptile(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
